title: Leather Goods
tagline: Cut, dyed and stitched under one roof.
blurb: Bags, wallets, belts, gym accessories and small leather goods, cut, dyed and stitched under one roof.
heroIntro: This is where the other five categories come together into finished product. Our cutting, dyeing, and stitching lines turn our own finished leather into bags, wallets, belts, and small goods - built to your specification, whether that's private label on an existing design or a fully custom development.
characteristics: Full in-house cutting, dyeing and stitching
Hardware and component sourcing to your spec
Quality inspection at every production stage
